title: Inplace ALTER TABLE might cause lost rows if concurrent purge
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE t2 ADD COLUMN age INTEGER;
UPDATE t2 SET age = NULL WHERE id = 2;
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE age IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Inplace ALTER TABLE with concurrent purge causes lost rows
